overall.description: A cinematic scene from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a group of characters gathered around a campfire in a desert nomad settlement at dusk. The first-person perspective shows the player character crouching by the fire while observing others socialize, including a guitarist playing on a nearby bench, with makeshift metal structures and shipping containers visible in the background.

events.description: camera begins panning left away from the campfire toward the guitarist

agents.ego_description: crouching near the campfire and beginning to look around toward the guitarist on the bench

notable_agents.action: woman playing an acoustic guitar while sitting on a blue bench
woman in green shirt standing with arms crossed observing the group

entered.detail: large bonfire with bright orange flames burning in a metal drum
weathered blue wooden bench with several beer bottles placed on it
woman with dark hair wearing a white tank top playing an acoustic guitar
makeshift metal and wood shanty buildings with external staircases
stacked blue shipping containers forming shelter walls

segments.scene_description: The scene opens with the player crouching near a bright campfire in a desert shantytown at dusk. The camera begins panning left toward a woman playing guitar on a blue bench, with makeshift metal structures and shipping containers visible in the background.

events.description: campfire moves out of frame as camera continues panning left
camera stops panning left and begins panning back right toward the campfire

agents.ego_description: continuing to crouch while observing the guitarist and the standing group members in the center of the camp

notable_agents.action: guitarist continuing to play music on the blue bench
man wearing a yellow hard hat and denim jacket standing with hands in pockets

entered.detail: man wearing a yellow construction helmet and blue work clothes
man sitting on a striped blanket on the dirt ground

segments.scene_description: With the campfire now out of view, the camera focuses on the guitarist and a man in a yellow hard hat standing nearby. Another man sits on a blanket on the ground to the right. The camera holds this view briefly before beginning to pan back right.

events.description: camera pans back right to reveal the campfire again in the foreground

agents.ego_description: crouching by the fire and observing the group, with the campfire now prominent in the right foreground

notable_agents.action: man in yellow hard hat standing and looking toward the fire
man sitting on blanket near the fire pit

entered.detail: large bonfire burning brightly with visible flames and embers

segments.scene_description: The camera pans back to the right, bringing the bright campfire into the foreground again. The man in the yellow hat and the seated man on the blanket are now the primary subjects, while the guitarist and bench have moved out of frame behind the camera.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera pan across a desert nomad settlement at dusk, shifting focus from a central campfire to a small group of socializing companions. It begins crouching beside the bright glow of the fire, panning left to reveal a woman playing guitar on a blue bench against a backdrop of shipping containers and makeshift metal structures. As the campfire moves out of view, the camera lingers on the guitarist and a man in a yellow hard hat, while another man sits nearby on a blanket. The scene then shifts as the camera pans back to the right, moving away from the musician to bring the warmth of the campfire back into the foreground. Finally, the view settles on the man in the yellow hat and his seated companion, leaving the guitarist behind as the fire once again dominates the frame.
